CREATE TABLE urls (url String);
INSERT INTO urls VALUES ('svn+ssh://some.svn-hosting.com:80/repo/trunk');
INSERT INTO urls VALUES ('http://user:password@example.com:8080/path?query=value#fragment');
INSERT INTO urls VALUES ('http://www.example.com:80/');
INSERT INTO urls VALUES ('https://news.clickhouse.com.tr/');
INSERT INTO urls VALUES ('ftp://ftp.example.com/file.txt');
INSERT INTO urls VALUES ('mailto:user@example.com');
INSERT INTO urls VALUES ('tel:+1234567890');
INSERT INTO urls VALUES ('magnet:?xt=urn:btih:example');
SELECT domain(url), protocol(url), port(url) FROM urls;
SELECT domain(url), domainWithoutWWW(url) FROM urls WHERE protocol(url) = 'http';
SELECT firstSignificantSubdomain(url), cutToFirstSignificantSubdomain(url) FROM urls WHERE port(url) > 0;
CREATE TABLE url_stats AS SELECT domain(url) AS domain_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM urls GROUP BY domain_name;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT url, protocol(url) AS proto FROM urls) AS sub WHERE proto = 'https';
SELECT domain(url) AS extracted_domain, port(url) AS extracted_port FROM urls WHERE extracted_port = 8080;
WITH (SELECT DISTINCT protocol(url) FROM urls) AS protocols SELECT COUNT(*) FROM urls WHERE protocol(url) IN protocols;
SELECT url, domain(url), domainWithoutWWW(url) FROM urls WHERE domain(url) LIKE '%.com';
SELECT netloc(url) AS network_location, topLevelDomain(url) AS top_level FROM (SELECT url FROM urls WHERE url LIKE 'http%');
SELECT cutToFirstSignificantSubdomain(url, 'public_suffix_list') AS subdomain_cut FROM urls;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) AS url_count FROM urls) AS cnt SELECT protocol(url), COUNT(*) AS proto_count FROM urls GROUP BY protocol(url) HAVING proto_count > cnt.url_count / 2;
CREATE TABLE additional_urls (url String) AS SELECT url FROM urls WHERE port(url) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT protocol(url), domain(url), port(url) FROM (SELECT * FROM urls UNION ALL SELECT url FROM additional_urls) AS combined;
SELECT cutToFirstSignificantSubdomainWithWWW(url), firstSignificantSubdomain(url) FROM urls WHERE url LIKE 'www.%';
